summary: Deep-dive trace and final spec saved for low env_steps_per_sec. User chose ralplan then implementation with telemetry-only first pass.

decisions: Use narrow value-head factory matching encoder/decoder composition
Represent format explicitly as player_count 2 or 4
Clean module composition takes priority over old checkpoint parameter compatibility
